description_long: This is a compact, tactical shotgun with a matte black finish and a short barrel, designed for close-quarters use. The shotgun features a prominent pistol grip with finger grooves for enhanced handling and control. Its fore-end includes a vertical foregrip, likely for improved stability during operation. The receiver is streamlined, with a visible ejection port and a robust trigger guard. The barrel is cylindrical and relatively short, with no visible ribbing or venting. The overall design suggests a focus on maneuverability and ease of use in confined urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black tactical shotgun with a pistol grip and vertical foregrip, designed for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pistol grip, vertical foregrip, short barrel, and streamlined receiver.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the foregrip beneath the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the pistol grip, vertical foregrip, and the ejection port on the receiver.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver, pistol grip, and the end of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible reinforcement
